title: Intensely Flaky American Wensleydale Pie
description: A sour and flaky pie perfect for a date night, featuring Wensleydale cheese and binchotan-charcoal for a unique flavor, and is sugar-free friendly.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together the flour, binchotan-charcoal powder, and salt.
Add the cold butter to the bowl and use a pastry blender to work it into the flour mixture until it resembles coarse crumbs.
Gradually add the ice water to the bowl, stirring with a fork until the dough comes together in a ball.
Turn the dough out onto a lightly floured surface and roll it out into a circle that is about 1/8 inch thick.
Transfer the dough to a 9-inch pie dish and trim the edges to fit.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the Wensleydale cheese, egg, and black pepper.
Pour the cheese mixture into the pie crust and smooth the top.
Bake the pie for 40 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown and the filling is set.
